title: xyris araracuarae
intro: Xyris araracuarae, also known as the Araracuara xyris, is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xyris araracuarae include treating various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Xyris araracuarae can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects.
